critic_raw:
CRITIQUE:

Three genuine concerns that do not require model rejection but require deployment conditions:

1. Safety-net distribution shift: unvalidated extension planned for 6 months post-launch to a substantially different patient population. Requires prospective validation gate.

2. Threshold cost-benefit gap: capacity-driven threshold not validated against the $45/$12,000 cost ratio. Break-even analysis should precede deployment.

3. HRRP externality: HRRP-relevant diagnosis groups not evaluated separately. Holdout stratification feasible pre-launch.

Verdict: EMPIRICAL_TEST_AGREED.

empirical_test.measure: Prospective safety-net hospital validation AUC-ROC; threshold precision vs. break-even; HRRP diagnosis-stratified holdout recall
empirical_test.success_criterion: Safety-net AUC-ROC >= 0.68; threshold precision above break-even; HRRP groups adequately recalled
empirical_test.failure_criterion: Safety-net AUC-ROC < 0.65; threshold below break-even; HRRP groups systematically missed
